title: Student Grade Tracker by Student ID

content.problemStatement:
You are given a Flask application that simulates a simple student grade tracking system. 

The application should have one route - A route to list all students and their grades. \
However, there are multiple errors in the code. \
Debug the code to get the following output.

### Expected output
1.When we update the URL as `student/101` the web page should display the following.


2.When we update the URL as `student/999` the web page should display the following.
